titleStmt.title: SII 4.1365: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1365. (A.R. No. 435 of 1893). AT THE SOUTH ENTRANCE INTO THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmānaśēṣanṛpavīrakirīṭakōṭisaṁghaṭṭahṛṣṭacaraṇāṁbuja
cārulīlaḥ . śrīgoṁkkabhūpatanayō bhuvanābhirāmō rājēṁdracōḍa
Iti viśrutapā¨rtthivēṁdraḥ [. 1*] tasya prasiddhayaśasō dayitā bhavānī śaṁbhōri
va priyatamā bhuvi goṁkkamāṁbā . Āsītsurēṁdrapurasuṁddarasuṁddarīśrīḥ śrī
bhīmanādhapurayōṣidaśēṣapuṇyā [. 2*] Ammāṁḍiyammāpe¨rmmalunāmmaśśaṁbōḥ pra
sādādalabhatsuputrīṁ śrīsuggalāṁbāmiha suṁdarīṇāṁ lakṣmīmiva svāśrita
kalpavallīṁ [. 3*] saiṣā viśēṣaguṇavattapasābhirāmā śrībhīmanādhacaraṇāṁbu
jabhaktiyōgāṁ . rājēṁdracōḍanṛpavallabhamōdapātraṁ lēbhē samastavinayā
goṁkkamāṁbāṁ [. 4*] sēyaṁ śakābdēnayanāṁbarēnducandraprayuktē samadādakhaṇḍa[ṁ .]
śrībhīmanādhāya mudāravīṁdu dīpaṁ tulābhāsvati goṁkkamāṁbā [. 5*] svasti . śa
kava¨rṣaṁbulu 1102 gunēṇṭi tulāsaṁkrāṁtinimittamuna śrīmaddākṣā
rāmamuna śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvaraku śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalēśvara
kulōttuṁggarājēṁdracōḍayarājula dēvulu gōkamahādēvulu
beṭṭina yakhaṁḍava¨rtti lōhadaṇḍudiviya Okkaṇṭiki bōlu naluvuruṁ būṇṭa
gānu mūṇḍavunaḍapuna yannabōla nā gomani vasamuna
ṁ beṭṭina yinupaEḍlu 50 . dīnikigānu nityapaḍi vōyaṁgala tribhuvanāṁkkuśa
likhitaṁ
Digital edition of SII 4.1365 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
